{"LastUpdate":"2026-07-19 16:30 UTC","Overview":{"ReportDate":"13 July 2026","ReportTime":"8:43 AM","ReportAnnouncements":"","ReportWhatsHappening":"

Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

some great conditions. McKay Summit is in good shape until the last couple of corners where it gets bare. McKay Loop and Pretty Valley Road are looking very nice and holding up amazingly well. High Plains Road is very patchy from Windy corner to the Aqueduct but holding up very nicely from there to the dam wall. Have a great day in the sun and enjoy yourselves! Low humidity overnight has allowed for the snowmakers to get it done. The snow has groomed up a treat and there should be some good turns to be had this morning. Things have remained firm off-piste all week, so expect similar conditions today. Slap on some sunscreen and ski and ride with care. Enjoy!
